mapper.select: SELECT id, name, engine, rule_type, enabled, params, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM cleanup_rules WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, name, engine, rule_type, enabled, params, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM cleanup_rules WHERE rule_type = #{ruleType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, name, engine, rule_type, enabled, params, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM cleanup_rules WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cleanup_rules (name, engine, rule_type, enabled, params, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{engine}, #{ruleType}, #{enabled}, #{params}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE cleanup_rules SET name = #{name}, engine = #{engine}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, enabled = #{enabled}, params = #{params}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
